---
title: "🔷 FAQ R"
body-classes: no-chapter-nav
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---
[]{#sec-85-faq-r}

### How do I set my working directory?

```{r}
#| eval: false
setwd()
```

I get this error...

**Solution:**

This is it!

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| eval: false

setwd(right)
```
